headers.value: autoplay=(https://www.youtube.com https://youtube.com), encrypted-media=(https://www.youtube.com https://youtube.com), camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://youtube.com https://drive.google.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'
